sql.trim: t1.ASSET_DW, t1.TY_SB_ROOM, t1.ASSET_BRAND, t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, t1.OFFICE_REGIS_NUMBER, t1.TY_SB_YONGT, t1.ID, t1.CREATED_DEPT, t1.INSERT_DATE, t1.APPLY_USER, t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP, t1.CREATED_BY, t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY, t1.ORIGINAL_VALUE, t1.TY_SB_CC_DATE, t1.TY_SB_CLASS, t1.CREATION_DATE, t1.PC_MAC_ADDRESS, t1.USED_DEPT, t1.OFFICE_COMPUTER_NUMBER, t1.ASSET_NAEM, t1.TY_SB_CODE, t1.PC_WINDOWS_VERSION, t1.ZR_USER, t1.TY_SB_STATUS, t1.ORG_IDENTITY, t1.OFFICE_MAC_ADDRESS, t1.GUILD_ID, t1.DEPRE_DATE, t1.TY_SB_XINGH, t1.TY_SB_SECRET_LEVEL, t1.ASSET_DETAILS, t1.TY_SB_BRAND, t1.USED_DEPT_ID, t1.TY_SB_NAME, t1.PC_INSTALL_DATE, t1.ASSET_TYPE, t1.TY_SB_ADDRESS, t1.TY_SB_QY_DATE, t1.TY_SB_ZE_USER, t1.STORAGE_PLACE, t1.TY_SB_CC_CODE, t1.PC_DISK_NUMBER, t1.ASSET_NUM, t1.OFFICE_USER_CODE, t1.TY_SB_IP, t1.TY_SB_DEPT, t1.ASSET_CODE, t1.TY_SB_TYPE, t1.TY_SB_NET_TYPE, t1.XH, t1.APPLY_USER_ID, t1.APPLY_LY_USER_ID, t1.CURRENT_VALUE, t1.VERSION, t1.GUILD_NAME, t1.ASSET_XHGG, t1.DATA_STATUS, t1.REMARK, t1.INSERT_TYPE, t1.ATTRIBUTE_01, t1.ATTRIBUTE_02, t1.ATTRIBUTE_03, t1.ATTRIBUTE_04, t1.ATTRIBUTE_05, t1.ATTRIBUTE_06, t1.YEAR_TO_BELONG, t1.INTO_DATE, t1.OUT_DATE,

mapper.select:
select
from DYN_FIXED_ASSETS_LEDGER t1
and t1.id in
#{item}
order by t1.creation_date desc
mapper.insert:
insert into DYN_FIXED_ASSETS_LEDGER
ASSET_DW,
TY_SB_ROOM,
ASSET_BRAND,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
OFFICE_REGIS_NUMBER,
TY_SB_YONGT,
ID,
CREATED_DEPT,
INSERT_DATE,
INTO_DATE,
OUT_DATE,
APPLY_USER,
LAST_UPDATE_IP,
CREATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
ORIGINAL_VALUE,
TY_SB_CC_DATE,
TY_SB_CLASS,
CREATION_DATE,
PC_MAC_ADDRESS,
USED_DEPT,
OFFICE_COMPUTER_NUMBER,
ASSET_NAEM,
TY_SB_CODE,
PC_WINDOWS_VERSION,
ZR_USER,
TY_SB_STATUS,
ORG_IDENTITY,
OFFICE_MAC_ADDRESS,
GUILD_ID,
DEPRE_DATE,
TY_SB_XINGH,
TY_SB_SECRET_LEVEL,
ASSET_DETAILS,
TY_SB_BRAND,
USED_DEPT_ID,
TY_SB_NAME,
PC_INSTALL_DATE,
ASSET_TYPE,
TY_SB_ADDRESS,
TY_SB_QY_DATE,
TY_SB_ZE_USER,
STORAGE_PLACE,
TY_SB_CC_CODE,
PC_DISK_NUMBER,
ASSET_NUM,
OFFICE_USER_CODE,
TY_SB_IP,
TY_SB_DEPT,
ASSET_CODE,
TY_SB_TYPE,
TY_SB_NET_TYPE,
XH,
APPLY_USER_ID,
APPLY_LY_USER_ID,
CURRENT_VALUE,
VERSION,
GUILD_NAME,
ASSET_XHGG,
DATA_STATUS,
REMARK,
INSERT_TYPE,
ATTRIBUTE_01,
ATTRIBUTE_02,
ATTRIBUTE_03,
ATTRIBUTE_04,
ATTRIBUTE_05,
ATTRIBUTE_06,
YEAR_TO_BELONG,
#{assetDw,jdbcType = VARCHAR},

#{depreDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{tySbXingh,jdbcType = VARCHAR},

#{tySbBrand,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{usedDeptId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},

#{tySbZeUser,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{storagePlace,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{tySbCcCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{pcDiskNumber,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{assetNum,jdbcType = DECIMAL},

#{tySbDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{assetCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{tySbType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{tySbNetType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},

#{applyUserId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{applyLyUserId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},

#{guildName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},

#{attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute06,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},

insert into DYN_FIXED_ASSETS_LEDGER( ASSET_DW , TY_SB_ROOM , ASSET_BRAND , LAST_UPDATE_DATE , OFFICE_REGIS_NUMBER , TY_SB_YONGT , ID , CREATED_DEPT , INSERT_DATE , INTO_DATE , OUT_DATE , APPLY_USER , LAST_UPDATE_IP , CREATED_BY , LAST_UPDATED_BY , ORIGINAL_VALUE , TY_SB_CC_DATE , TY_SB_CLASS , CREATION_DATE , PC_MAC_ADDRESS , USED_DEPT , OFFICE_COMPUTER_NUMBER , ASSET_NAEM , TY_SB_CODE , PC_WINDOWS_VERSION , ZR_USER , TY_SB_STATUS , ORG_IDENTITY , OFFICE_MAC_ADDRESS , GUILD_ID , DEPRE_DATE , TY_SB_XINGH , TY_SB_SECRET_LEVEL , ASSET_DETAILS , TY_SB_BRAND , USED_DEPT_ID , TY_SB_NAME , PC_INSTALL_DATE , ASSET_TYPE , TY_SB_ADDRESS , TY_SB_QY_DATE , TY_SB_ZE_USER , STORAGE_PLACE , TY_SB_CC_CODE , PC_DISK_NUMBER , ASSET_NUM , OFFICE_USER_CODE , TY_SB_IP , TY_SB_DEPT , ASSET_CODE , TY_SB_TYPE , TY_SB_NET_TYPE , XH , APPLY_USER_ID , APPLY_LY_USER_ID , CURRENT_VALUE , VERSION , GUILD_NAME , ASSET_XHGG , DATA_STATUS , REMARK , INSERT_TYPE , ATTRIBUTE_01 , ATTRIBUTE_02 , ATTRIBUTE_03 , ATTRIBUTE_04 , ATTRIBUTE_05 , ATTRIBUTE_06 , YEAR_TO_BELONG )
select #{item.assetDw,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.tySbRoom,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.assetBrand,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.assetType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.tySbAddress,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.tySbQyDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.tySbZeUser,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute06,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.yearToBelong,jdbcType = VARCHAR} from dual
mapper.update:
update DYN_FIXED_ASSETS_LEDGER
ASSET_DW = #{assetDw,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
TY_SB_ROOM = #{tySbRoom,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ASSET_BRAND = #{assetBrand,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
OFFICE_REGIS_NUMBER = #{officeRegisNumber,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
TY_SB_YONGT = #{tySbYongt,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
INSERT_DATE = #{insertDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
INTO_DATE = #{intoDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
OUT_DATE = #{outDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
APPLY_USER = #{applyUser,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ORIGINAL_VALUE = #{originalValue,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
TY_SB_CC_DATE = #{tySbCcDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
TY_SB_CLASS = #{tySbClass,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
PC_MAC_ADDRESS = #{pcMacAddress,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
USED_DEPT = #{usedDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
OFFICE_COMPUTER_NUMBER = #{officeComputerNumber,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ASSET_NAEM = #{assetNaem,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
TY_SB_CODE = #{tySbCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PC_WINDOWS_VERSION = #{pcWindowsVersion,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ZR_USER = #{zrUser,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
TY_SB_STATUS = #{tySbStatus,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
OFFICE_MAC_ADDRESS = #{officeMacAddress,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
GUILD_ID = #{guildId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
DEPRE_DATE = #{depreDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
TY_SB_XINGH = #{tySbXingh,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
TY_SB_SECRET_LEVEL = #{tySbSecretLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ASSET_DETAILS = #{assetDetails,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
TY_SB_BRAND = #{tySbBrand,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
USED_DEPT_ID = #{usedDeptId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
TY_SB_NAME = #{tySbName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PC_INSTALL_DATE = #{pcInstallDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
ASSET_TYPE = #{assetType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
TY_SB_ADDRESS = #{tySbAddress,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
TY_SB_QY_DATE = #{tySbQyDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
TY_SB_ZE_USER = #{tySbZeUser,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
STORAGE_PLACE = #{storagePlace,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
TY_SB_CC_CODE = #{tySbCcCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PC_DISK_NUMBER = #{pcDiskNumber,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ASSET_NUM = #{assetNum,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
OFFICE_USER_CODE = #{officeUserCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
TY_SB_IP = #{tySbIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
TY_SB_DEPT = #{tySbDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ASSET_CODE = #{assetCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
TY_SB_TYPE = #{tySbType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
TY_SB_NET_TYPE = #{tySbNetType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
XH = #{xh,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
APPLY_USER_ID = #{applyUserId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
APPLY_LY_USER_ID = #{applyLyUserId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CURRENT_VALUE = #{currentValue,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
VERSION = version+1,
GUILD_NAME = #{guildName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ASSET_XHGG = #{assetXhgg,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
DATA_STATUS = #{dataStatus,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
INSERT_TYPE = #{insertType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_01 = #{attribute01,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_02 = #{attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_03 = #{attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_04 = #{attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_05 = #{attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_06 = #{attribute06,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
YEAR_TO_BELONG = #{yearToBelong,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update DYN_FIXED_ASSETS_LEDGER set ASSET_DW = #{assetDw,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TY_SB_ROOM = #{tySbRoom,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ASSET_BRAND = #{assetBrand,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , OFFICE_REGIS_NUMBER = #{officeRegisNumber,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TY_SB_YONGT = #{tySbYongt,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = DEPRE_DATE = #{depreDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , TY_SB_XINGH = #{tySbXingh,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TY_SB_SECRET_LEVEL = #{tySbSecretLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ASSET_DETAILS = #{assetDetails,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TY_SB_BRAND = #{tySbBrand,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , USED_DEPT_ID = #{usedDeptId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TY_SB_NAME = #{tySbName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PC_INSTALL_DATE = #{pcInstallDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ASSET_TYPE = #{assetType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TY_SB_ADDRESS = #{tySbAddress,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TY_SB_QY_DATE = #{tySbQyDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , TY_SB_ZE_USER = #{tySbZeUser,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , STORAGE_PLACE = #{storagePlace,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TY_SB_CC_CODE = #{tySbCcCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PC_DISK_NUMBER = #{pcDiskNumber,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ASSET_CODE = #{assetCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TY_SB_TYPE = #{tySbType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TY_SB_NET_TYPE = #{tySbNetType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , XH = #{xh,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , APPLY_USER_ID = #{applyUserId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , APPLY_LY_USER_ID = #{applyLyUserId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CURRENT_VALUE = #{currentValue,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , VERSION = version+1 , GUILD_NAME = #{guildName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ASSET_XHGG = #{assetXhgg,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_STATUS = #{dataStatus,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , INSERT_TYPE = #{insertType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_01 = #{attribute01,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_02 = #{attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_03 = #{attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_04 = #{attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_05 = #{attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_06 = #{attribute06,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , YEAR_TO_BELONG = #{yearToBelong,jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update.foreach: update DYN_FIXED_ASSETS_LEDGER set ASSET_DW = #{item.assetDw,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TY_SB_ROOM = #{item.tySbRoom,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ASSET_BRAND = #{item.assetBrand,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , OFFICE_REGIS_NUMBER = #{item.officeRegisNumber,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TY_SB_YONGT = #{item.tySbYongt,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ID #{item.assetDetails,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TY_SB_BRAND = #{item.tySbBrand,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , USED_DEPT_ID = #{item.usedDeptId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TY_SB_NAME = #{item.tySbName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.tySbIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TY_SB_DEPT = #{item.tySbDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ASSET_CODE = #{item.assetCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TY_SB_TYPE = #{item.tySbType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_STATUS = #{item.dataStatus,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , REMARK = #{item.remark,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , INSERT_TYPE = #{item.insertType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_01 = #{item.attribute01,jdbcType = #{item.version}
